forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,45 @@
+---
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '80'
+title: Remove semantic search from shelltool â€” keep grep only
+---
+## What
+
+Remove the `search history` semantic-search operation and its entire embedding-indexing pipeline from the shell tool. Grep stays â€” it already reads the plain `.shell/log` file via `grep::searcher`, **not** the embedding DB, so removing embeddings does not affect it.
+
+**Key constraint:** Do NOT remove the `swissarmyhammer-embedding` / `model_embedding` dependencies from `crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/Cargo.toml`. They are still used by `code_context/mod.rs`. This change touches only the shell tool's use of them.
+
+### Subtasks
+
+- [ ] **Delete the `search history` operation.** Remove `crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/search_history/` (whole dir). In `crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/mod.rs`: drop `pub mod search_history;`, the `SEARCH_HIST` static, its entry in `SHELL_OPERATIONS`, the `"search history" => â€¦` dispatch arm in `execute()`, and `search history` from the unknown-op error message. Update the module-level doc comment (lines 1-38: "six operations" â†’ five, drop the `search history` bullet and "embedding search" mentions) and the `schema()` description string (line 524, remove "and semantic search"). Remove `pub fn with_embedder(...)` (lines 162-170).
+
+- [ ] **Strip embedding indexing from `state.rs`** (`crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/state.rs`). Remove: `ChunkJob` enum, the SQLite `chunks` table + `rusqlite::Connection` `db` field, `chunk_tx`/`worker_handle`/`line_buffer`/`chunk_counts` fields, `send_chunk`, `flush_chunks`, `flush_line_buffer`, `search_handle`, `search`, `embed_query`, `score_session_chunks`, `SearchResult`, `embedding_worker` + all its helpers (`ensure_model_loaded`, `unpack_chunk_job`, `insert_chunk_row`, `update_chunk_embedding`, `build_embedder`, `load_or_warn`, `drain_inserts_only`), `encode_embedding`/`decode_embedding`, `with_dir_and_embedder`, and the `injected_embedder` param of `build`. Remove now-unused imports (`rusqlite`, `model_embedding`, `swissarmyhammer_embedding`, `mpsc`, `JoinHandle`, `oneshot`, `cosine_similarity`). Keep `GrepResult`, `grep()`, `get_lines()`, log-file writing in `append_lines` (drop only the chunk-buffering block), and the command lifecycle methods (drop the `flush_line_buffer` calls in `complete_command`/`timeout_command`/`kill_process`). Delete the embedding-only unit tests (`test_encode_decode_roundtrip`, `test_cosine_similarity_*`); keep grep/get_lines/lifecycle tests.
+
+- [ ] **Remove `flush_chunks` from execute_command** (`crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/execute_command/mod.rs`). Drop the three `guard.flush_chunks().await;` calls (â‰ˆ lines 216, 237, 244) and update the surrounding doc comments that reference "embedding worker"/"pending chunks". Delete the `test_execute_uses_injected_embedder` test (lines â‰ˆ374-401) and its `MockEmbedder`/`with_embedder` usage.
+
+- [ ] **Update docs/skill/README.** In `crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/description.md`: remove the `### search history` section, the `**search history**` "When to use" bullet, the `## Search vs grep` section, and the "semantic search" phrases in the header lines (1-3). In `builtin/skills/shell/SKILL.md` (source of truth â€” do NOT hand-edit the generated `.sah/skills/shell/SKILL.md`): remove the `### search history` section, the `search history` "When to use" bullet, the `## Search vs grep` section, and the "semantic search" mention (line 15); then regenerate the deployed copy so `.sah/skills/shell/SKILL.md` matches. In `apps/shelltool-cli/README.md`: remove the "Semantic search" bullet (line 21). Fix the doc comments mentioning semantic search in `apps/shelltool-cli/src/cli.rs` (line 35) and `apps/shelltool-cli/src/commands/serve.rs` (test-module doc comment about the "background embedding worker", â‰ˆ lines 133-135).
+
+- [ ] **Fix tests referencing the removed pipeline.** In `crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/tests/integration/file_size_limits.rs`: replace `register_shell_with_mock_embedder` (â‰ˆ lines 385-397, which uses `MockEmbedder` + `with_embedder`) with plain `registry.register(ShellExecuteTool::new())` (or `new_isolated`), and update its callers/doc comment. In `mod.rs` tests: update `test_shell_tool_has_operations` (6 â†’ 5 ops, drop the `search history` assertion), `test_unknown_operation_lists_all_valid_ops` (drop `search history`), and remove `test_dispatch_search_history_missing_query`. Confirm `tests/integration/semantic_search_e2e.rs` is untouched (it covers code_context, not shell).
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] The shell MCP tool exposes exactly 5 operations: `execute command`, `list processes`, `kill process`, `grep history`, `get lines`. No `search history`.
+- [ ] Sending `{"op":"search history",...}` returns the "Unknown operation" error listing the 5 valid ops (no `search history`).
+- [ ] `grep history` still works end-to-end (regex + command_id filter + limit) over stored command output.
+- [ ] No remaining references to embeddings/chunks/`flush_chunks`/`with_embedder`/`MockEmbedder` in the `shell/` tree; `swissarmyhammer-embedding`/`model_embedding` remain depended-on only by `code_context`.
+- [ ] `description.md`, `builtin/skills/shell/SKILL.md` (+ regenerated `.sah/skills/shell/SKILL.md`), and `apps/shelltool-cli/README.md` no longer mention semantic search.
+- [ ] `cargo build -p swissarmyhammer-tools -p shelltool-cli` succeeds with no warnings about unused embedding imports.
+
+## Tests
+
+- [ ] Update `test_shell_tool_has_operations` in `crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/mod.rs` to assert `ops.len() == 5` and that the five remaining ops are present; remove `search history` from `test_unknown_operation_lists_all_valid_ops`; delete `test_dispatch_search_history_missing_query`.
+- [ ] Add/keep a `grep history` dispatch + behavior test proving grep returns matching lines after `execute command` (the existing `state.rs` grep tests + `mod.rs::test_dispatch_grep_history` cover this â€” verify they still pass unchanged).
+- [ ] Update `crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/tests/integration/file_size_limits.rs` shell tests to construct the tool without an injected embedder; they must still pass.
+- [ ] Run: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-tools shell` and `cargo nextest run -p shelltool-cli` â†’ all green.
+- [ ] Run: `cargo build -p swissarmyhammer-tools -p shelltool-cli` â†’ clean (no unused-import / dead-code warnings from the removal).
+
+## Workflow
+
+- Use `/tdd` where adding behavior; this is primarily deletion, so lean on updating the existing op-count and dispatch tests first (they should fail until the op is removed), then make them pass.
+
+#shelltool #cleanup
\ No newline at end of file

Remove `pub fn with_embedder(...)` (lines 162-170).
-
-- [ ] **Strip embedding indexing from `state.rs`** (`crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/state.rs`). Remove now-unused imports (`rusqlite`, `model_embedding`, `swissarmyhammer_embedding`, `mpsc`, `JoinHandle`, `oneshot`, `cosine_similarity`). Keep `GrepResult`, `grep()`, `get_lines()`, log-file writing in `append_lines` (drop only the chunk-buffering block), and the command lifecycle methods (drop the `flush_line_buffer` calls in `complete_command`/`timeout_command`/`kill_process`). Delete the embedding-only unit tests (`test_encode_decode_roundtrip`, `test_cosine_similarity_*`); keep grep/get_lines/lifecycle tests.
-
-- [ ] **Remove `flush_chunks` from execute_command** (`crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/execute_command/mod.rs`). -

-

-## Workflow
-
-- Use `/tdd` where adding behavior; this is primarily deletion, so lean on updating the existing op-count and dispatch tests first (they should fail until the op is removed), then make them pass.

-#shelltool #cleanup

Keep `GrepResult`, `grep()`, `get_lines()`, log-file writing in `append_lines` (drop only the chunk-buffering block), and the command lifecycle methods (drop the `flush_line_buffer` calls in `complete_command`/`timeout_command`/`kill_process`). Delete the embedding-only unit tests (`test_encode_decode_roundtrip`, `test_cosine_similarity_*`); keep grep/get_lines/lifecycle tests.

-- [x] **Remove `flush_chunks` from execute_command.** Dropped the 3 calls, updated doc comments, deleted `test_execute_uses_injected_embedder`.

Delete the `test_execute_uses_injected_embedder` test (lines â‰ˆ374-401) and its `MockEmbedder`/`with_embedder` usage.

-- [x] **Update docs/skill/README.** Cleaned `description.md`, `builtin/skills/shell/SKILL.md` (+ hand-synced `.sah/skills/shell/SKILL.md`), `apps/shelltool-cli/README.md`, `cli.rs`, `serve.rs`.
+- [ ] **Update docs/skill/README.** In `crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/description.md`: remove the `### search history` section, the `**search history**` "When to use" bullet, the `## Search vs grep` section, and the "semantic search" phrases in the header lines (1-3). In `builtin/skills/shell/SKILL.md` (source of truth â€” do NOT hand-edit the generated `.sah/skills/shell/SKILL.md`): remove the `### search history` section, the `search history` "When to use" bullet, the `## Search vs grep` section, and the "semantic search" mention (line 15); then regenerate the deployed copy so `.sah/skills/shell/SKILL.md` matches. In `apps/shelltool-cli/README.md`: remove the "Semantic search" bullet (line 21). Fix the doc comments mentioning semantic search in `apps/shelltool-cli/src/cli.rs` (line 35) and `apps/shelltool-cli/src/commands/serve.rs` (test-module doc comment about the "background embedding worker", â‰ˆ lines 133-135).

-- [x] **Fix tests referencing the removed pipeline.** `file_size_limits.rs` now registers a plain `ShellExecuteTool::new()`; `mod.rs` op-count/unknown-op/dispatch tests updated. `semantic_search_e2e.rs` untouched.
+- [ ] **Fix tests referencing the removed pipeline.** In `crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/tests/integration/file_size_limits.rs`: replace `register_shell_with_mock_embedder` (â‰ˆ lines 385-397, which uses `MockEmbedder` + `with_embedder`) with plain `registry.register(ShellExecuteTool::new())` (or `new_isolated`), and update its callers/doc comment. In `mod.rs` tests: update `test_shell_tool_has_operations` (6 â†’ 5 ops, drop the `search history` assertion), `test_unknown_operation_lists_all_valid_ops` (drop `search history`), and remove `test_dispatch_search_history_missing_query`. Confirm `tests/integration/semantic_search_e2e.rs` is untouched (it covers code_context, not shell).

 ## Acceptance Criteria

-- [x] The shell MCP tool exposes exactly 5 operations: `execute command`, `list processes`, `kill process`, `grep history`, `get lines`. No `search history`.
-- [x] Sending `{"op":"search history",...}` returns the "Unknown operation" error listing the 5 valid ops (no `search history`).
-- [x] `grep history` still works end-to-end (regex + command_id filter + limit) over stored command output.
-- [x] No remaining references to embeddings/chunks/`flush_chunks`/`with_embedder`/`MockEmbedder` in the `shell/` tree; `swissarmyhammer-embedding`/`model_embedding` remain depended-on only by `code_context`.
-- [x] `description.md`, `builtin/skills/shell/SKILL.md` (+ regenerated `.sah/skills/shell/SKILL.md`), and `apps/shelltool-cli/README.md` no longer mention semantic search.
-- [x] `cargo build -p swissarmyhammer-tools -p shelltool-cli` succeeds with no warnings about unused embedding imports.
